title: Free API Key — Provider Schema
description: Schema for providers.json. Each provider entry must conform to this schema.

signup_url.description: Direct signup / API key creation page

type.description: aggregator=multi-model gateway, first_party=model creator, inference_provider=third-party hosting, local=runs on device

openai_compatible.description: True if the provider's API is compatible with the OpenAI SDK (chat completions endpoint)

base_url.description: Base URL for API calls. e.g. 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1'

scheme.description: bearer=Authorization: Bearer <key>, api_key_header=custom header, query_param=?key=<key>, none=no auth (local)

header.description: Header name used for auth. e.g. 'Authorization'

models.description: List of free-tier models offered by this provider (at least 3 recommended)

id.description: Exact model ID as used in API calls. e.g. 'deepseek/deepseek-chat:free'

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens per call. null if not specified/unlimited

modalities_out.description: Output modalities this model can produce

tool_use.description: native=trained OpenAI function-calling, prompt=system-prompt simulation, none=unsupported

json_mode.description: Whether the model supports forced JSON output mode

streaming.description: Whether the model supports SSE streaming

reasoning.description: Whether the model outputs a visible CoT / thinking trace (e.g. DeepSeek-R1, Gemini Thinking)

code_specialized.description: Whether the model is specifically optimized for code tasks

speed_tier.description: fast=200+ tok/s (Groq/Cerebras), slow=reasoning models or 70B+, medium=everything else

best_for.description: 1-3 primary use cases this model excels at

free_tier.description: True if this model is available on the permanent free tier

notes.description: Any additional notes about this model

capabilities_summary.description: Derived from models[]. Used by scripts and Phase 11 capability matrices for fast lookups.

supports_vision_in.description: Any free model accepts image input

supports_image_gen.description: Any free model produces image output

supports_audio_in.description: Any free model accepts audio input

supports_audio_out.description: Any free model produces audio output

supports_video_in.description: Any free model accepts video input

supports_pdf_in.description: Any free model accepts PDF input

supports_tool_use.description: Any free model has native tool/function calling

supports_streaming.description: Any free model supports SSE streaming

supports_json_mode.description: Any free model supports JSON mode

supports_reasoning.description: Any free model outputs visible CoT trace

max_context_free.description: Largest context window among free-tier models

limits.description: Rate limits for the free tier. Use null when not published.

notes.description: Additional limit details, caveats, or source-conflict notes

trains_on_data.description: yes=trains by default, no=explicitly does not train, opt_out=trains unless you opt out, unknown=not clearly stated

logs_prompts.description: Whether the provider logs/stores your prompt content

retention_days.description: How many days prompts/responses are retained. null if not published.

human_review.description: Whether human staff may review your prompts (e.g. for safety/training)

policy_url.description: URL to the provider's privacy policy

notes.description: Additional privacy notes (e.g. how to opt out, contradictions between sources)

method.description: HTTP method for the key validation endpoint

endpoint.description: Full URL of the key validation endpoint

expect_status.description: Expected HTTP status code for a valid key

rate_limit_headers.description: Response headers that contain rate limit info (e.g. ['x-ratelimit-limit', 'x-ratelimit-remaining'])

last_verified.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this provider's data was last verified against official sources

sources.description: Official URLs consulted to verify this provider's data
